data.title: Complement Regulation to Undo Systemic Harm in Preeclampsia: The CRUSH Study
data.brief_summary: This is a Phase II, single arm, open-label study to determine if treatment with eculizumab prolongs pregnancy compared to historical controls in women with preeclampsia between 23-30 weeks gestation.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion criteria:

1. Provision of signed and dated informed consent form
2. Stated willingness to comply with all study procedures \& availability for study duration
3. Biologically female, aged ≥13, body weight ≥40kg
4. Diagnosed with preeclampsia between 23-29+6/7 weeks gestation, by following
endpoints: Latency (in Days) From Enrollment to Delivery
